prompt:
Task: Pick the single most likely winner of the 2027 French presidential election.

Commit to ONE name.

Ground rules:
- Give ONE name, even if confidence is low. A low-confidence guess is the right answer when you're uncertain — not a refusal.
- "Unknown" is ONLY acceptable if you literally have no knowledge of French politics (virtually never true for a modern LLM). Do not use it as an escape hatch.
- Do not add disclaimers, warnings, or prose outside the JSON.

Respond with valid JSON only:
{"candidate": "Full Name", "confidence": "low" | "medium" | "high", "reasoning": "one concise sentence citing one concrete factor"}

results.name: Google Gemini
results.reasoning: He consistently ranks as one of France's most popular politicians and is well-positioned to unite the center and center-right in a second-round runoff.

results.name: Mistral
results.reasoning: Former Prime Minister with strong centrist appeal and name recognition, positioning him as a unifying figure amid potential fragmentation.

results.name: xAI Grok
results.raw: {"candidate": "Marine Le Pen", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "She has the strongest organized opposition base after repeated strong showings in national elections against a fragmented field."}
results.reasoning: She has the strongest organized opposition base after repeated strong showings in national elections against a fragmented field.

results.name: OpenAI
results.raw: {"candidate":"Jordan Bardella","confidence":"low","reasoning":"He has led many early 2027 voting-intention polls as the likely National Rally candidate."}
results.reasoning: He has led many early 2027 voting-intention polls as the likely National Rally candidate.

results.name: Anthropic Claude
results.raw: {"candidate": "Jordan Bardella", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "The RN leads first-round polling and Marine Le Pen's embezzlement conviction ineligibility makes Bardella the likely far-right standard-bearer in a fragmented field."}
results.reasoning: The RN leads first-round polling and Marine Le Pen's embezzlement conviction ineligibility makes Bardella the likely far-right standard-bearer in a fragmented field.
